title: MacOS v14 and v15 Intel Core i5 - Machine does not start anymore
body:
### Issue Description

This Issue is for: 5.3.1 / 5.3.2 and 5.4.x

The default machine does not start anymore. Keeps hanging until i use podman machine reset.

$ podman machine start
endless loop

keeps on trying to start
$ podman machine stop

only way to stop it 
$ podman machine reset

I reinstalled using podman-desktop.
Reintsall podman with brew.
Reinstalled MacOs over the existing data
Reinstalled MacOs on blank HDD

Docker works fine, so i tried to use an older Version:
$ podman --version
podman version 5.2.5
$ podman machine ls
NAME                     VM TYPE     CREATED         LAST UP         CPUS        MEMORY      DISK SIZE
podman-machine-default*  applehv     16 minutes ago  10 minutes ago  4           2GiB        25GiB

So it seems that there is something wrong with Versions of podman >= 5.3.x on Intel MacOS 14 and 15.
